name: Gnarly Tree Rex
description: Gnarly Tree Rex is a blue variant of the Life Giant, Tree Rex. He was originally released as part of special console bundles for the PlayStation 3 and Nintendo Wii before receiving a standalone release.
biography: Long before the Giants protected Skylands, Tree Rex was a majestic tree living in the ancient woods. But when the Arkeyans built a factory nearby to forge their mechanical war machines, the pollution from the factory began to seep into the soil and transform Tree Rex into something else. He grew into a massive, walking engine of destruction with the strength of a forest. While some were afraid of him, Tree Rex used his great power to fight against the Arkeyans and protect Skylands.
personality: Tree Rex is a noble and powerful giant who takes his role as a protector of Skylands very seriously. Despite his intimidating size and bark-like exterior, he is a dedicated defender of nature and a steadfast ally to the Skylanders.

story.content: Tree Rex was one of the original Giants who fought against the Arkeyan Empire long ago. Alongside his fellow Giants, he helped banish the Arkeyan King and free Skylands from mechanical tyranny before being sent to Earth.

trivia: Gnarly Tree Rex has the same colors as legendary Skylanders, albeit with a more vibrant shade of blue.
In Giants, his eyes glow green much like his figure form. However, in Swap Force and Trap Team, his eyes glow blue like his original counterpart.
He was originally exclusive to the Blue Wii bundle and the PlayStation 3 Super Slim bundle.
gameplay: As a Giant, Tree Rex is slow but possesses immense strength. He uses powerful punches and light-based projectiles to defeat enemies. He can also perform 'Feats of Strength' to interact with the environment, such as lifting boulders or pulling islands together.

basic.name: Arbor Smash
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to smash enemies with your massive wooden fists.

basic.name: Sequoia Charge
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to charge forward and knock enemies out of the way.

basic_upgrades.name: Photosynthesis Cannon
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to fire a concentrated beam of light from your arm cannon.

basic_upgrades.name: Shockwave Slam
basic_upgrades.content: Arbor Smash now creates a shockwave that deals extra damage.

soulgems.name: Woodpecker Pal
soulgems.content: A friendly woodpecker joins you in battle, attacking nearby enemies.

wow_pows.name: Super Stampede
wow_pows.content: Hold Attack 2 during a charge to deal massive damage to anything in your path.

abilities.name: Titanic Smash
abilities.content: Increases damage and range of all physical attacks.
